summary: Full testing of Hujjah v4 major update: 36-tile board, real category images, free user category lock, wide TV-style question layout, SAR pricing. All 9 backend tests and 11 frontend feature tests passed.

issues: Timer is positioned on the right side (RTL) rather than 'at the top' as specified in requirements. The layout is wide TV-style with timer beside the question card (flex-row on md+). Functional but slightly differs from 'timer at top' spec. Minor design note.

Large empty space above and below the question card on 1920x1080. The card is horizontally wide but vertically short, leaving ~35% blank dark space at top and bottom. Consider using h-full on the card container to better fill the screen.

action_items: Minor: QuestionPage has large empty vertical space on wide screens (1920px) - card doesn't fill the available height
Note: Premium user flow not testable (no premium account available) - test manually with premium user
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 requirements verified: 36 tiles ✓, real images ✓, free user 6 locked cats ✓, TV-style layout ✓, 19.99 SAR ✓, board fills screen ✓, tile slot1/slot2 work ✓, tile marked used after click ✓, /api/free-categories ✓
Stripe checkout MOCKED (sk_test_emergent returns 503) - expected behavior
server.py still ~1200 lines - should be refactored into modules
seed_data_creation: Game sessions created during testing (auto-cleanup not implemented)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v4 features verified: Guest→Setup→CategorySelect (6 locked cats w/ real images)→GameBoard (36 tiles, 6 cols × 6 tiles each: 3 difficulties × 2 slots)→Question (wide TV layout, timer right side)→Back (tile marked used). PricingPage: 19.99 SAR monthly, 149.99 SAR annual. /api/free-categories returns 6 ids with image_urls. Premium user flow NOT tested - no premium account.
